blocks.text: Look up the Klingon greeting "nuqneH" and propose a respectful opening line for a diplomatic dispatch to Chancellor K'mpec.
"nuqneH" literally means "what do you want" — it's blunt by Federation standards but standard among Klingons.

blocks.name: web_fetch
blocks.text: nuqneH is the standard Klingon greeting. In formal diplomatic contexts it is paired with "qaleghneS".
For a dispatch to Chancellor K'mpec, open with "qaleghneS, Chancellor — nuqneH?" The honorific softens the bluntness; together they read as warm-but-direct, which Klingons respect.
